info.name: Pawffy API — Production
info.description:
Complete Pawffy Backend API — https://pawffy-backend.onrender.com

## Security
- All endpoints require Bearer token (except public ones)
- Tokens auto-stored after Register/Login via test scripts
- Rate limits: Auth 10/15min · Payments 20/15min · Uploads 10/15min · General 120/15min
- Validation errors return: { success:false, errors: ["field message", ...] }

## Password Policy
Min 8 chars · Must contain uppercase + lowercase + digit

## RBAC
🔒 Admin only: GET /users, DELETE /users/:id, GET /bookings/all
🔒 Admin/Partner: POST/PUT /vets, /vet-services, /availability

## Variables (auto-filled)
token · userId · petId · vetId · serviceId · bookingId · conversationId · resetToken

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description:
Rate limit: 10 req / 15 min on register & login · 5 req / hour on forgot-password
Logout increments tokenVersion → all issued tokens become invalid instantly

request.description:
⚠️ Rate limited: 10 attempts / 15 min

Password policy: min 8 chars, must contain uppercase + lowercase + digit
Example valid: Password123

⚠️ Rate limited: 10 attempts / 15 min
Failed attempts are logged with IP.

exec: console.log('Token cleared. All sessions on all devices are now invalid.');

request.description:
Increments tokenVersion in DB → every JWT issued before this call is instantly rejected.
All devices are logged out simultaneously.

⚠️ Rate limited: 5 req / hour

Dev mode: resetToken returned in response.data.resetToken
Production with SMTP: email sent only, token NOT in response.

Always returns 200 (prevents email enumeration).

Token expires in 1 hour. Single use only.
Also increments tokenVersion → logs out all devices.

exec: console.log('✅ New token saved — other sessions logged out');

request.description: Logs out all other devices. Returns a fresh token for the current session.

item.description: 🔒 GET / and DELETE /:id require admin role

request.description:

Field name must be: avatar
Stored as base64 data URL in DB.
🔒 Requires role: admin

Change the role of any user. Admin only.

Valid roles: user | admin | vet

Rate limit: general (100/15min)
🔒 Requires role: admin
gender: male | female | unknown

⚠️ Rate limited: 10 uploads / 15 min
Field name must be: image

item.name: 🩺 Vets
item.description:
Public: GET /vets, GET /vets/:id, /slots, /services, /reviews
🔒 Admin/Partner: POST/PUT/DELETE vets, services, availability
🔒 Any auth user: POST reviews

{
  "name": "Dr. Priya Sharma",
  "email": "priya@pawcare.com",
  "serviceType": "vet",

request.description:
🔒 Requires role: admin or partner

serviceType: vet | groomer | walker | trainer | sitter | boarding | transport | poop_scooper

item.name: Get Vets — Search by name / clinic

request.description: 🔒 Requires role: admin or partner

Returns all time slots with available:true/false.
Slots already booked (pending/confirmed) are marked available:false.
Returns name, description, price, duration for each active service.

🔒 Admin/Partner only. Create one service per request.
Common services to seed:
• General Consultancy $40
• Vaccination $60
• Emergency Care $100
• Dental Care $70
• Others $70

rating: 1–5 (integer). One review per user per vet.
Average rating on Vet is auto-recalculated.

item.name: 📅 Bookings — Full Flow
item.description:
Complete 5-step booking flow:
1. GET /vets/:vetId/services  → select service + price
2. GET /vets/:vetId/slots?date → pick time slot
3. GET /pets                    → pick pet
4. Client collects symptoms/reason
5. POST /bookings               → create booking
6. GET /payments/summary/:id   → price breakdown
7. POST /payments/apply-coupon → optional coupon
8a. POST /payments/create-intent → card/net_banking (Stripe)
8b. POST /payments/confirm       → wallet
9. GET /bookings/:id            → confirmation screen

body.raw:
{
  "petId": "{{petId}}",
  "vetId": "{{vetId}}",
  "serviceId": "{{serviceId}}",
  "bookingType": "veterinarian",
  "bookingDate": "2026-07-15",
  "bookingTime": "11:00",
  "reasonForVisit": "My dog has been lethargic for 2 days",
  "symptoms": "Vomiting,Lethargy,Loss of appetite",
  "symptomsDuration": "2 Days ago",
  "notes": "Please check ears as well"
}

request.description:
bookingType: veterinarian | grooming | walking | training | boarding | sitting | sitter | poop_scooper | transport

symptomsDuration: Today | 2 Days ago | A week ago | More than a week

Conflict check: returns 409 if that slot is already booked.

Returns: servicePrice + platformFee($5) + tax(5%) - discount = total
Also returns pawPoints earned.

item.name: STEP 8a — Create Stripe PaymentIntent (Card / Net Banking)

request.description:
paymentMethod: card | net_banking

Returns clientSecret → pass to flutter_stripe:
  Stripe.instance.initPaymentSheet(paymentIntentClientSecret: clientSecret)
  Stripe.instance.presentPaymentSheet()

Booking confirmed automatically via Stripe webhook.

Wallet payment — no Stripe. Confirms immediately.
Returns appointmentId + booking details.

Call after flutter_stripe payment sheet closes.
Syncs Stripe status with DB if webhook hasn't fired yet.
Returns: stripeStatus, paymentStatus, bookingStatus, appointmentId
Returns: appointmentId, vet, pet, dateTimeFormatted, totalPaid, paymentStatus
🔒 Requires role: admin
Valid values: pending | confirmed | completed | cancelled

Returns: otherUser, lastMessage, updatedAt, unreadCount (orange dot)
Optional: ?search=name filters by other user's name

Tap a vet profile → call this to get or create a conversation.
Returns conversationId + otherUser info.
Set {{receiverId}} to the other user's ID. Creates conversation if first message.
Call when user opens a conversation — clears the unread (orange dot) count.

item.name: 💳 Payments
item.description:
⚠️ Rate limited: 20 req / 15 min
Payment methods: card | net_banking (Stripe) · wallet (direct)

request.description: Returns: serviceName, servicePrice, platformFee($5), tax(5%), discount, total, pawPoints

paymentMethod: card | net_banking
Returns clientSecret for flutter_stripe
Call after flutter_stripe payment sheet closes. Returns: stripeStatus, bookingStatus, appointmentId

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
